idea-plugin.name: Ember
idea-plugin.description:
Ember — a warm, monochrome color theme for JetBrains IDEs. One vivid coral spark in a sea of warm graphite.

Ships six variants:

  • Ember, Ember Soft, Ember Light — classic look on Darcula / Light bases.
  • Islands Ember, Islands Ember Soft, Islands Ember Light — same palette on JetBrains' Islands base theme (cards-on-canvas chrome, transparent toolbars/status bar).

Palette mirrors ember-theme/ember; syntax mapping ports the conventions from ember-theme/nvim.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release.
  • Three regular variants: Ember, Ember Soft, Ember Light.
  • Three Islands variants targeting JetBrains' Islands base theme.
  • Editor color scheme covers default text attributes; language-specific overrides inherit from Darcula / Default.
